headline: Independent Fire Testing Confirms Eos Z3 Battery System Exhibited No Thermal Runaway, No Sustained Fire, and No Propagation Under Abuse Testing; Company Receives ISO 14001 Certification
summary: Independent destructive-abuse testing by the Energy Safety Response Group (direct flame + overcharge) confirmed the Z3 system showed no thermal runaway, no sustained fire, no module-to-module propagation and no off-gas ignition — third-party validation of Z3's core safety advantage, supporting siting/permitting, insurance and NFPA 855 alignment. Eos also received ISO 14001 environmental-management certification.
